_meta.description: Figure metadata for the 2026 AHA/ASA AIS Guidelines. Figures are visual/algorithmic content - this file stores structured descriptions for text-based retrieval.

figures.title: Journey of a patient with AIS
figures.description: The phases of care and key management steps and treatments are highlighted to ensure the most optimal functional outcome. Covers the full patient journey from symptom onset through EMS activation, hospital arrival, imaging, treatment decisions (IVT, EVT), and post-acute care.

figures.title: ASPECTS: Alberta Stroke Program Early CT Score
figures.description: Visual reference showing the 10 regions of the MCA territory used for ASPECTS scoring on noncontrast CT. Each region with early ischemic changes subtracts 1 point from a starting score of 10. A score of 10 indicates no early ischemic changes; 0 indicates diffuse ischemic involvement of the entire MCA territory.
key_elements: M2 - MCA cortex lateral to insular ribbon
M4 - anterior MCA territory above M1
M5 - lateral MCA territory above M2
M6 - posterior MCA territory above M3

scoring.interpretation: Each region with early ischemic change subtracts 1 point. Score 10 = no ischemic changes. Score 0 = diffuse involvement.

clinical_thresholds.0-2: Very large core - limited trial data

abbreviations.ASPECTS: Alberta Stroke Program Early CT Score

figures.title: Algorithm for management of AIS eligibility for EVT
figures.description: Flowchart algorithm for determining EVT eligibility based on vessel occlusion type (LVO, MVO, DVO), time window, NIHSS score, ASPECTS, prestroke mRS, and imaging criteria. Covers anterior circulation LVO with different pathways for 0-6 hour and 6-24 hour windows.
key_elements: LVO of the anterior circulation (primary pathway)
decision_nodes: Is this an LVO of the anterior circulation?
Is the patient within 0-6 hours or 6-24 hours?

abbreviations.NIHSS: National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale

figures.title: DAPT for minor noncardioembolic AIS and TIA
figures.description: Decision algorithm for dual antiplatelet therapy selection in minor noncardioembolic acute ischemic stroke and transient ischemic attack. Routes through NIHSS score, ABCD2 score, time from last known normal, and presumed etiology to select appropriate DAPT regimen from the five major trials (CHANCE, POINT, THALES, CHANCE 2, INSPIRES).
key_elements: CHANCE 2 regimen: ticagrelor + aspirin x 21d (CYP2C19 LOF)

abbreviations.ABCD2: Age, Blood Pressure, Clinical Features, Duration, and Diabetes (TIA risk score)
abbreviations.NIHSS: National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale

figures.title: Characteristics of an organized specialized inpatient care unit: flow diagram
figures.description: Flow diagram showing the organizational structure and characteristics of a specialized stroke inpatient care unit, including staffing requirements, monitoring protocols, interdisciplinary team composition, and quality improvement processes.
key_elements: Patient flow from acute to rehabilitation
